smokeping_url_hint: Base URL of your Smokeping instance (without /cache/)
smokeping_targets_hint: Comma-separated Smokeping hierarchy paths (e.g. InternetSites.Google). Check your Smokeping Targets config for the exact names.
smokeping_setup_intro: Smokeping measures network latency by sending pings to configured targets. DOCSight can display these graphs alongside your modem data.
smokeping_setup_step_1: Suiteáil agus cumraigh Smokeping ar do líonra
smokeping_setup_step_2: Note the base URL of your Smokeping web interface
smokeping_setup_step_3: Cuir isteach an URL agus ainmneacha na spriocanna i Socruithe DOCSight
